title: pack2

messages.description: outputs the stored list of elements
a float or symbol to set to slot 0 and output
a float or symbol to set to slot 0
a float or symbol to set to slot $nth and output
a float or symbol to set to slot $nth
the message composed of the given elements

arguments.description: the number of elements = the number of inlets. <f> or <symbol> — initial value

body: [pack2] is kinda similar to Pd Vanilla's [pack], but any inlet triggers the output (though a "set" message avoids the output). It can also initialize a symbol value and it doesn't create a list selector for you. Moreover, you can change many elements with a list message and an element that was initialized as a float can become a symbol and vice versa.
